sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_strings (id UInt8, haystack String) ENGINE = Memory;
INSERT INTO test_strings VALUES (1, 'Hello ClickHouse World');
INSERT INTO test_strings VALUES (2, 'Fuzzy Testing with ClickHouse');
SELECT id, multiSearchFirstIndexCaseInsensitive(haystack, ['clickhouse', 'world']) AS position FROM test_strings;
UPDATE test_strings SET haystack = 'New String for Testing' WHERE id = 1;
